name: twig-plus
description: Twig formatter and editor tooling for VSCode.

twigPlus.format.profile.description: Formatting profile baseline. Use phpstorm to keep TwigPlus aligned with PHPStorm-style whitespace and line breaking.

twigPlus.format.indentSize.description: Number of spaces used for indentation when tabs are disabled.

twigPlus.format.printWidth.description: Preferred maximum line width for embedded CSS and JavaScript formatting.

twigPlus.format.useTabs.description: Use tabs instead of spaces for indentation.

twigPlus.format.htmlAttributeWrap.description: Control whether long HTML opening tags are wrapped to one attribute per line.

twigPlus.format.preserveSingleLineBlocks.description: Keep simple single-line HTML blocks such as {{ value }} on one line.

twigPlus.format.lineBreakAfterTwigContro.description: Break lines after Twig control tags like block, if, else, and endblock when markup or text follows on the same line.

enumDescriptions: Deprecated alias; requests run on Hybrid with internal fatal-error fallback.
Deprecated alias; shadow comparison is now test-only.
twigPlus.parser.engine.description: Select the parser engine. hybrid-shadow compares Hybrid AST results while returning legacy behavior; hybrid uses verified results with automatic legacy fallback.

twigPlus.templates.roots.description: Workspace-relative Twig template roots used for template completion, diagnostics, and Go to Definition. Use * for one path segment, for example src/*/Resources/views.

twigPlus.twig.version.description: Optional Twig 3.x version override. When omitted, TwigPlus reads safe project metadata, then composer.lock, then uses the latest bundled 3.x specification without version-only diagnostics.

enumDescriptions: Enable when Symfony Twig Bundle or Bridge is detected in static Composer/metadata files.
Enable Symfony reference features for this resource.
twigPlus.symfony.reference.description: Enable package-aware Symfony route, asset, and translation references from static metadata. TwigPlus never executes workspace PHP.

twigPlus.diagnostics.unresolvedNames.deprecationMessage: Use twigPlus.diagnostics.unresolvedNameMode. This compatibility setting will be removed in a future release.
twigPlus.diagnostics.unresolvedNames.description: Legacy unresolved-name switch. false maps to off and true maps to strict when unresolvedNameMode is not configured.

twigPlus.diagnostics.unresolvedNameMode.description: Control unresolved Twig diagnostics. Safe only reports application names when authoritative project metadata is available; strict reports every unknown name; off disables these diagnostics.

twigPlus.diagnostics.globals.description: Application-provided Twig global variable and function names excluded from unresolved-name diagnostics.

twigPlus.editing.autoCloseHtmlTags.deprecationMessage: Use twigPlus.editing.htmlTagClosing. Explicit false remains compatible with off.
twigPlus.editing.autoCloseHtmlTags.description: Legacy HTML closing switch retained for one compatibility release.

enumDescriptions: Atomically type > and its closing tag when the Hybrid model proves the opening tag is safe.
Only expand a complete opening tag when Enter is pressed.
twigPlus.editing.htmlTagClosing.description: Choose how TwigPlus closes complete non-void HTML tags. On-type handling immediately delegates to native typing unless a single atomic closing edit is provably safe.

twigPlus.editing.autoCloseTwigTags.description: Automatically insert the matching Twig end tag when Enter is pressed after a complete opening control tag.

twigPlus.editing.autoCloseCssBraces.description: Automatically insert an indented closing brace when Enter is pressed after an opening CSS brace inside a style element.

twigPlus.editing.autoCloseJavaScriptBrac.description: Preserve atomic Enter indentation for an existing JavaScript brace pair. Brace insertion and deletion remain owned by VS Code.

twigPlus.editing.linkedHtmlTags.description: Use VS Code linked editing to keep matching HTML opening and closing tag names synchronized in Twig documents.

scripts.build: node scripts/clean-dist.js && tsc -p tsconfig.json && esbuild src/extension.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --external:vscode --external:prettier --external:vscode-html-languageservice --external:vscode-languageserver-textdocument --outfile=dist/extension.js && esbuild ../language-server/src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --external:prettier --external:typescript --outfile=dist/server.js
